hooks.command: file=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if echo "$file" | grep -qE '\.(js|html)$'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "PostToolUse", "additionalContext": "REMINDER (from claude.md): You just modified a .js or .html file. Have you incremented the cache version in sw.js (CACHE_NAME) AND updated the version label in index.html? Both must match. Do this before finishing your task."}}'; fi
